mapper.select: SELECT A.SN, A.MD_SJ, A.REVIV_CO, B.STRE_FILE_NM FROM MEDIA A JOIN FILE_DETAIL_INFO B USING(FILE_SN) WHERE SN = #{sn}
SELECT A.SN, A.MD_SJ,A.MD_CODE, B.FILE_SN, B.FILE_STRE_COURS, B.STRE_FILE_NM, B.FILE_EXTSN, B.FILE_SIZE FROM MEDIA A JOIN FILE_DETAIL_INFO B USING(FILE_SN) WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
